input.headline: How to connect with old friends and why it matters

raw.headline: How to connect with old friends and why it matters

winner: I tried reconnecting with an old friend, so I dug up his childhood address—only to realize he'd literally left his number in the ground all along.

candidates.text: I tried reconnecting with an old friend, so I dug up his childhood address—only to realize he'd literally left his number in the ground all along.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a clever play on 'left his number in the ground,' concise and specific, with natural English and strong humor."}

candidates.text: Why did my old friend get blocked? I guess he needed to *reconnect* his Wi-Fi!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses a pun on 'reconnect' but is somewhat generic and relies on a common tech reference, limiting its surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: I tried reconnecting with an old friend, but he just said, "Yeah, I remember you—you’re the guy who always showed up last in our group photos!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and has a mild surprise element, but it's slightly generic and lacks deeper humor or emotional resonance."}

candidates.text: Why did my old friend block me on social media? I guess reconnecting with people isn’t just about sending a ‘hey, long time no see,’—it’s about not getting the cold shoulder when you do.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild twist, but it's a bit generic and lacks the sharp surprise or specificity that would make it stand out in a humor competition."}

candidates.text: I told my high school buddy I was gonna call him—he said that’s how I reconnected last time too, which is true, and he wasn’t lying about anything else.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild twist, but it lacks punch and feels more like a casual observation than a humorous statement."}
